creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Yasuhiro KIMURA,

thanks for your patch!

For postfix 3.x we changed the complete build procedure to support the new dynamic module loading e.g. for cdb, ldap, lmdb, mysql, pcre, pgsql and sqlite.
In (near) future pkg will support sub-packages, so we can provide dynamic modules for users using dynamic backends.

Since there are many other changes and we want to improve some more parts on the 3.x port postfix-2.11 will be the default for the next time.

However, the postfix-current port reflects with commit (r378978) the postfix-3.0.0 release.

Regards.
